## Notes on the Paper by Julia Rohrer about Age, Periods, Cohorts.

Age = Period - Cohort.

Example, Age (25) = Period (2011) - Cohort (1986)

*Differences associated with time* cannot be attributed to segregated effects of age, period and cohort because they are perfectly multi-colinear.

In my example: we have to assume away cohort-effects on employment.
